title: ネイチャ・イン・メジロ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen and Mejiro Ryan agree to let
Nice Nature spend a day with them to learn the
secret of their strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she accompanies them during their training,
she finds that their strength comes from their
mutual respect and competition with each other.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Nice Nature realizes that the key to improving is
to observe the other racers around her and use
that as motivation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the Takarazuka Kinen just up ahead, her
desire to beat the two Mejiro racers grows
stronger.
